text:
Author: miwi
Date: Mon Jun 17 15:15:37 2013

URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/321127

Log:
  - Update to 6.2

Modified:

Modified: head/deskutils/ganyremote/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/deskutils/ganyremote/Makefile	Mon Jun 17 15:10:33 2013	(r321126)
+++ head/deskutils/ganyremote/Makefile	Mon Jun 17 15:15:37 2013	(r321127)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	ganyremote
-PORTVERSION=	6.1
+PORTVERSION=	6.2
 CATEGORIES=	deskutils comms gnome
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/anyremote/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}
 
@@ -15,9 +15,9 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	anyremote:${PORTSDIR}/comms
 
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
 
+USES=		gettext
 USE_GNOME=	pygtk2
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
-USES=		gettext
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
